name: The World R2 dotHack G.U. RPG
description:
A faithful recreation of the .hack G.U. MMORPG [The World] R2

Welcome to [The World] R2.

Create your own character, go on your own adventure, be any class from the Steam Powered sequel MMO, meet other players, make a guild, the skies the limit! In the intro message there will be a tutorial, so you can go in knowing nothing about the games and still have fun! The setting is a world filled with steampunk, magic, alchemy, and a bit more of an edgier vibe than its Fantasy Counterpart. If you would rather more Mystical instead of technology based, check out This recreation of The World R1 I made. This version sports 11 classes! With much more focus on Character Creation! The 11 Classes are Adept Rogue (Jack of all Trades Master of None), Twin Blade (Duel Swords!), Edge Punisher (Huge Swords!!), Blade Brandier (Normal swords and katana), Flick Reaper (Scythes and Axes!), Macabre Dancer (Buff and Debuff Magic!), Harvest Cleric (Healing Magic!), Shadow Warlock (Offensive Magic!), Tribal Grappler (Fists and Glove weapon!), Lord Partizan (Spears!), and Steam Gunner (Pistols and Rifles!). You'll meet all kinds of new NPC's on your journey! The game's events never happened here, so, see what's different. Go root around!

Author's Note: Oh boy this one was much harder than R1. there is so much added to R2. I hope you all enjoy it though, again, I may go back and make some lorebooks and scripts but...this thing tuckered me out ya'll. Tested well with Deepseek.
creator: Serimew
